positive: A highly stylized and whimsical jungle scene, featuring bioluminescent tropical flora, exotic toucans, and playful monkeys nestled among vibrant, stylized leaves. The composition should be a dynamic circular emblem design with strong, clean silhouettes and excellent negative space. Utilize a deep teal and emerald green color palette contrasted with pops of electric cyan and magenta from the bioluminescence. The style is a blend of modern vector illustration and vintage botanical etching, with crisp lines, high contrast, and a focus on symmetry and repeating patterns for seamless apparel printing. Perfect for a central-composition t-shirt design, vector art style, flat design, clean illustration, detailed linework, maximalist yet balanced.
negative: blur, grainy, text, logo, watermark, blurry, low detail, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, human figures, photorealistic, smoke, dirty, messy, cropped, disfigured
